hypothesis: Incorporating stereochemical information as an eighth molecular modality—through explicit 3D coordinate serialization or stereodescriptor-augmented SMILES—into the STR-Bamba multimodal framework will create a distinct, separable cluster in the unified latent space and yield statistically significant improvements in property prediction tasks where stereochemistry is mechanistically determinative, such as chiral drug bioactivity and enantioselective reaction outcomes, compared to the seven-modality model that lacks explicit stereo-spatial encoding.
